differentials.name: Rupture of pulmonary artery aneurysm: TB, vasculitis, trauma, neoplasm, abscess, septic embolus, indwelling catheter
differentials.raw: Rupture of pulmonary artery aneurysm: TB, vasculitis, trauma, neoplasm, abscess, septic embolus, indwelling catheter

Pulmonary embolus with infarction: bronchial blood flow may increase by 300% in the weeks following pulmonary artery embolization

context: √  bronchial blood flow may increase by 300% in the weeks following pulmonary artery embolization
